title: geum strictum
intro: Geum strictum, also known as brown bedstraw or brown chickweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum strictum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Geum strictum is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, and can also be used as a topical application to treat wounds and skin conditions.
